scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @translator/shared && npm run build --workspace @translator/server && npm run build --workspace @translator/web
scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace @translator/shared && npm run dev --workspace @translator/server
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @translator/shared && cd apps/web && npm run dev
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @translator/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @translator/web
